mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO device_telemetry ( ts, tenant_id, device_id, product_id, property, value_number, value_string, value_bool, raw_payload ) VALUES
( #{item.ts}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.deviceId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.property}, #{item.valueNumber}, #{item.valueString}, #{item.valueBool}, CAST(#{item.rawPayload, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS JSONB) )
mapper.select:
WITH bucket_cfg AS ( SELECT CAST( CASE WHEN #{interval} = '1m' OR #{interval} = '1 minute' THEN 60 WHEN #{interval} = '5m' OR #{interval} = '5 minutes' THEN 300 WHEN #{interval} = '15m' THEN 900 WHEN #{interval} = '30m' THEN 1800 WHEN #{interval} = '1h' OR #{interval} = '1 hour' THEN 3600 WHEN #{interval} = '6h' THEN 21600 WHEN #{interval} = '1d' OR #{interval} = '1 day' THEN 86400 WHEN #{interval} = '7d' THEN 604800 WHEN #{interval} = '30d' THEN 2592000 ELSE 3600 END AS BIGINT ) AS bucket_seconds ), filtered AS ( SELECT t.ts, t.value_number FROM device_telemetry t WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.device_id = #{deviceId} AND t.property = #{property} AND t.value_number IS NOT NULL
AND t.ts >= CAST(#{startTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS TIMESTAMPTZ)
AND t.ts <= CAST(#{endTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS TIMESTAMPTZ)
), bucketed AS ( SELECT to_timestamp( floor(extract(epoch FROM f.ts) / cfg.bucket_seconds) * cfg.bucket_seconds ) AS bucket, f.value_number FROM filtered f CROSS JOIN bucket_cfg cfg ) SELECT bucket AS bucket, AVG(value_number) AS avgVal, MAX(value_number) AS maxVal, MIN(value_number) AS minVal, COUNT(1) AS count FROM bucketed GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket DESC

SELECT latest.property, latest.value_number AS valueNumber, latest.value_string AS valueString, latest.value_bool AS valueBool, latest.ts FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (property) property, value_number, value_string, value_bool, ts FROM device_telemetry WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY property, ts DESC ) latest ORDER BY latest.property ASC

SELECT latest.property, latest.value_number AS valueNumber, latest.value_string AS valueString, latest.value_bool AS valueBool, latest.ts FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (property) property, value_number, value_string, value_bool, ts FROM device_telemetry WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY property, ts DESC ) latest ORDER BY latest.property ASC
